name: Hanyu Group Joint-Stock Co., Ltd.
summary: Hanyu Group Joint-Stock Co., Ltd. manufactures and supplies washing machine and dishwasher core components, and drainage pumps for household appliances in China. It offers spa toilet, permanent magnet ferrite radial anisotropy rotor, and special engineering plastic products, as well as automotive core components and micro-charged products. The company was formerly known as Jiangmen iDear-Hanyu Electrical Joint-Stock Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hanyu Group Joint-Stock Co., Ltd. in December 2019. Hanyu Group Joint-Stock Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Jiangmen, China.
